title: Call of Duty®: Mobile - Garena
notes:
● New MP Mode: Throwable Frenzy; Complete a match to unlock brand-new in-match combat abilities!
● New Scorestreak: VTOL Jet; The VTOL Jet first drops two precision bombs, then returns above the battlefield to defend an area designated by the user.
● New BR Mode Plunder: Treasure Heist; break through layers of Cognitive Reinforcements, and seize the Treasure! 
● New Weapon: FSS Hurricane; The new submachine gun, FSS Hurricane, trades range and power for increased magazine capacity and stability.
